\tzpentry{ID5732}{Gyromagnetic Action Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5732 introduces Gyromagnetic Action Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{S}_{\mathrm{gyro}} = \int_{\mathcal{M}} \mathrm{d}^{4}x\, \left( \alpha\, F_{\mu\nu}F^{\mu\nu} + \beta\, \lvert \nabla \times \mathbf{G} \rvert^{2} + \gamma\, \rho_{\mathrm{info}} \right), \end{equation}
